title: Another renameTokenCheckAll() fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE b(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, a_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(a_id) REFERENCES a(id));
INSERT INTO a(name, value) VALUES('test', NULL);
CREATE VIEW c AS SELECT a.id, b.id AS b_id FROM a LEFT JOIN b ON a.id = b.a_id;
ALTER TABLE a RENAME COLUMN name TO new_name;
key_bug_features: Fault in renameTokenCheckAll() during debugging mode
